Diplomatic Proposal System

Handles pending diplomatic proposals for multiplayer games Per docs/architecture/diplomacy_proposals.md

Imports

../../common/types/core, types

Types

PendingProposal = object
  id*: string
  proposer*: HouseId
  target*: HouseId
  proposalType*: ProposalType
  submittedTurn*: int
  expiresIn*: int
  status*: ProposalStatus
  message*: string
ProposalStatus {.pure.} = enum
  Pending, Accepted, Rejected, Expired, Withdrawn
ProposalType {.pure.} = enum
  NonAggressionPact, TradeAgreement, MilitaryAlliance, TechnologySharing

Procs

proc findProposal(proposals: seq[PendingProposal]; proposalId: string): Option[
    PendingProposal] {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Find pending proposal by ID 
proc findProposalIndex(proposals: seq[PendingProposal]; proposalId: string): int {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Find index of proposal by ID (-1 if not found) 
proc generateProposalId(turn: int; proposer: HouseId; target: HouseId): string {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Generate unique proposal ID

Exports

canFormPact, dishonoredBonusPrestige, isInPact, pactReinstatementCooldown, isEnemy, ViolationHistory, initDiplomaticRelations, PrestigeEvent, DishonoredStatus, DiplomaticIsolation, globalDiplomacyConfig, isolationDuration, dishonoredDuration, violationPrestigePenalty, violationRepeatWindow, violationRepeatPenalty, getDiplomaticState, initViolationHistory, DiplomaticRelation, ViolationRecord, DiplomaticState, HouseId, canReinstatePact, DiplomaticRelations, countRecentViolations, DiplomaticReport, DiplomaticEvent, setDiplomaticState
